subject: An elf warrior with long pale hair holding aloft a glowing green lantern-like object, examining something in a dark, eerie environment
description: A pointy-eared elf figure stands at the center of the frame in a darkened, smoky environment. They hold up a softly glowing green source of light — a lantern, crystal, or magical orb — that illuminates their face and chest from below and casts an eerie green wash across the scene. Their expression is intent, focused, almost wary. Wisps of green vapor or smoke curl through the air. The composition is tight and atmospheric, evoking a paranormal investigator at work in the dark.
foreground: Elf investigator holding glowing green light source
background: Murky, smoky darkness with hints of looming shapes
